title: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist II Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Rishikesh has declared the latest job notification for 2026. Alotted various vacancies for Project Research Scientist II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the BAMS Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs...
